description: 4 units total: PHYSICS 135-2/136-2 and PHYSICS 135-3/136-3 sequences (2.66 units including 0.33-unit labs), plus 1.33 units from McCormick-approved basic science categories (Chemistry, Physics, Biological Science, Earth & Planetary Science, or Astronomy).

description: DSGN 106 and ENGLISH 106 sequences, plus one approved design elective

Standard for all degree programs. Submit theme form for approval by winter quarter of junior year. 7 social sciences/humanities courses; maximum of 5 credits from either category; at least 3 courses must be thematically related; no more than 3 100-level courses. AP, IB, and transfer credits are eligible.

description: These prerequisites overlap with EE degree requirements and do not require additional courses.

All required. For the intro programming requirement, students typically take either COMP_SCI 111-0 or COMP_SCI 150-0 (not both). Note: At least 4 of these must be unique to the minor (not used toward another degree/minor).
